svg.title: ESP-32 Drone Component Inventory
svg.desc: Labeled inventory map of all components used in the ESP-32 drone build, grouped by type: resistors, capacitors, LEDs, ICs, diodes, and the microcontroller.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the 200 ohm resistor used for in the drone?')
sendPrompt('What is the 150 ohm resistor used for in the drone?')
sendPrompt('What is the 100 ohm resistor used for in the drone?')
sendPrompt('What is the 10k ohm resistor used for in the drone?')
sendPrompt('How does the SI2300 MOSFET work as a motor switch?')
sendPrompt('Why are IN4148 diodes used in the drone circuit?')
sendPrompt('What are the 0.01µF capacitors used for in the drone?')
sendPrompt('What are the 0.1µF capacitors used for in the drone?')
sendPrompt('What does the white LED indicate on the drone?')
sendPrompt('What does the green LED indicate on the drone?')
sendPrompt('What does the red LED indicate on the drone?')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the XIAO ESP32-S3 microcontroller')
sendPrompt('How does the MPU6050 provide attitude data for PID control?')
sendPrompt('What LiPo battery specs are used in this drone?')

g.text: Total build cost under $40 · PCB fabricated by JLCPCB · Frame: 3D printed PLA
